title: leontodon tenuiflorus
intro: Leontodon tenuiflorus, also known as slender hawk's beard or slender hawkbit, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its bitter compounds. The health benefits of Leontodon tenuiflorus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the liver function. Herbal preparations of Leontodon tenuiflorus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
